nasb.text: David said to Saul, “Let no man’s heart fail on account of him; your servant will go and fight with this Philistine.”

esv.text: And David said to Saul, “Let no man’s heart fail because of him. Your servant will go and fight with this Philistine.”

cnv.text: 大衛對掃羅說：“大家都不要因這非利士人喪膽，你的僕人要去與這非利士人決鬥。”

ccb.text: 大卫对扫罗说：“大家不要因这个非利士人而丧胆，让仆人去战他。”
